overview: RAP Integrated Studio Management — a luxury, cinematic platform for a premium photography, videography, and short film studio. Features multi-role authentication, real-time multi-service booking with Stripe payments, a 50-course learning platform, gallery, AI chatbot, and a full admin CMS with instant site updates.
features: Premium cinematic dark theme with gold accents and glassmorphism UI
Multi-role login: Admin, Client, Staff, Student, Receptionist
Stripe payment gateway with dynamic hour-based pricing
Multi-service booking with real-time total calculation
50-course learning platform with progress tracking and certificates
Admin CMS dashboard with real-time booking confirmations and analytics
Masonry gallery with lightbox and category filters
AI chatbot widget and full-page FAQ
Email and WhatsApp notifications for all bookings and payments
